page_metadata.biotools__summary: Webserver that computes protein structure refinement based on minimization of a knowledge-based potential of mean force. Stereochemistry may also be optimized using the MESHI software.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Webserver that computes protein structure refinement based on minimization of a knowledge-based potential of mean force. Stereochemistry may also be optimized using the MESHI software.
